subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and I bear witness that there is none other God but Him, the Almighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم و اشهد بانه لا اله الا هو العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
